pick.title: Select your device
pick.description: These Reef Factory devices were found on your network. Pick one, or choose manual entry.

manual.title: Enter device IP
manual.description: No device was found automatically, or you chose manual entry. Enter the LAN IP address. Reserve a static IP for it in your router first.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device. Check the IP and that it is on the same network.
error.not_supported: That device responded but is not a supported Reef Factory device (serial does not start with RFKH or RFDP).

abort.not_ours: Discovered device is not a configured Reef Factory device.

init.title: Multi Reef options
init.description: Logs raw WebSocket frames from the device to the Home Assistant log for troubleshooting. Leave off during normal use.
